name: Spaghetti with Peanut Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: The Frugal Gourmet 'Whole Family Cookbook'
Place the peanut butter in a small glass jar. Add the hot water.
Stir with a fork until smooth. Add the remaining ingredients, except the pasta and coriander, to the peanut butter mixture. Stir together until smooth and set aside.
Cook the pasta and drain well. Place the drained pasta in a bowl. Stir the reserved peanut butter mixture together and add it to the cooked pasta. Toss everything together and garnish with coriander.
